title: Improvements to EventBrite Integration
excerpt: My team uses Monday.com for all aspects of event planning. We have a Ticket Pacing board where each week we manually compare ticket pacing and revenue numbers from prior years. The current EventBrite integration pulls re…

posts.author: AshlyKeating (Ashly Keating )
posts.cookedHtml: My team uses Monday.com for all aspects of event planning. We have a Ticket Pacing board where each week we manually compare ticket pacing and revenue numbers from prior years. The current EventBrite integration pulls registration info but I’m looking for overall ticket counts and total revenue to be pulled in per event
